title: Shadow Credentials: msDS-KeyCredentialLink Modified (Event 5136)
description: Detects shadow-credentials attacks at the directory layer: a write to the msDS-KeyCredentialLink attribute (Event 5136, schemaIDGUID 5b47d60f-6090-40b2-9f37-2a4de88f3063) adds an attacker-controlled key pair so PKINIT can mint a TGT for the victim. Complements the existing Whisker process-creation rule with the authoritative DS-change event.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and (('Event ID' = '5136' and ('Properties' like '*5b47d60f-6090-40b2-9f37-2a4de88f3063*' or 'Properties' like '*msDS-KeyCredentialLink*')))
falsepositives: Windows Hello for Business / passwordless key enrollment
